source: Learning Ansible with Rocky - Ansible Galaxy: Ansible collections and ansible-galaxy collection

options: A distribution format bundling playbooks, roles, modules, and plugins
questions.why: Collections package roles, modules, plugins, and playbooks together.

questions.q: Install the community.general collection with ansible-galaxy.
questions.why: ansible-galaxy collection install <namespace.collection> installs a collection.

questions.q: Which flag upgrades an already-installed collection?
questions.why: ansible-galaxy collection install namespace.collection --upgrade upgrades it.

questions.q: How do you reference a module that comes from an installed collection?
Where are installed collections stored by default (per the example)?
Create a skeleton for your own collection named rocky8.rockstarcollection.
questions.why: ansible-galaxy collection init <namespace.name> scaffolds a new collection.

questions.q: The generated collection skeleton contains directories for...
options: docs, plugins, and roles (plus a galaxy.yml)
questions.why: A new collection has docs/, plugins/, roles/ and a galaxy.yml manifest.
